standard: Accuride 3832 / Knape & Vogt 8400 full-extension side-mount slide
description: Full-extension ball-bearing drawer slide (closed): three telescoping members — cabinet, intermediate, and drawer — stacked across the width with ball-race running clearance, mounting holes (round or slotted) on the outer members. Three separate bodies.
source: Accuride 3832 full-extension slide datasheet (length/height/width/hole pattern); load-class height/width from Knape & Vogt 8400 / Hettich KA
